template.name: BhuKhadan SEO Head

t.t-value: 'coal bearing land acquisition, CBA Act 1957, Coal Bearing Areas, SECL, Section 4, Section 7, Section 11, compensation award, land acquisition software, BhuKhadan'
bhu_og_description or meta_description or 'BhuKhadan — digital platform for coal-bearing land acquisition under the CBA(A&D) Act, 1957.'

t.t: BhuKhadan is a unified digital platform for coal-bearing land acquisition under the CBA(A&D) Act, 1957 — from Section 4(i) notification through award and compensation.

t.t-value: 'CBA Act 1957, coal bearing land acquisition, Section 4, Section 7, Section 11, SECL, BhuKhadan LAMS'

div.span: Coal Bearing Land Acquisition · CBA(A&D) Act 1957
div.h1: Digitise every stage from notification to award
div.p: BhuKhadan connects field survey, statutory workflows, and compensation on one auditable platform built for SECL and coal-bearing area administration.
From Patwari to Collector — every role gets the right tools, the right approvals, and a clear audit trail across the full acquisition lifecycle.

img.alt: BhuKhadan dashboard on tablet and mobile

div.p: Real-time tracking of every project stage.
Paperless coordination across departments.
Capture Khasra, GPS, and photos from the field — sync when back online.
Equitable records with immutable history.

div.h2: Everything you need in one platform
div.p: From field data collection to final notification — every step is digitised, secured, and audit-ready.
Patwari and field teams record land details, GPS points, and upload photos on-site — even offline.
Seamless creation and approval workflows for Sections 4(i), 7(i), 8, 9(i), and 11(i).
Instant generation and digital signing of official notifications and reports.
Track acquisition progress and parcel status across all projects in real time.
Secure logins for Collector, SDM, Tahsildar, RI, Patwari & field teams.
Insights with project-wise and section-wise monitoring dashboards and exports.
Four core pillars that make BhuKhadan the trusted choice for land administration.
"Streamlines workflow and reduces manual effort across all departments."
"Every process is fully traceable through immutable digital records."
"Real-time progress visibility ensures no delays across all stages."
"Seamless coordination between field teams and administration."

div.h2: From the field to the Collector's desk — instantly.

div.p: Patwaris and field teams record land details, GPS points, and photos from the field — even offline.
Collectors and officials view project progress, approvals, and compensation status in real time.
Instant notifications for pending approvals, expiring deadlines, and escalation triggers.
Track every core stage from survey entry to award and payment in one continuous flow.
Form 10
Notification
Intention
Objections
Declaration
Acquisition order
Compensation
Disbursement

div.div: Status colors: Green completed, Brown active, Grey pending.

div.p: Projects Managed
Land Parcels Processed
Government Users
Platform Uptime
Join leading administrations using BhuKhadan to deliver faster, fairer, and more transparent coal-bearing land acquisition under the CBA(A&D) Act, 1957.

t.t: Explore BhuKhadan features for coal-bearing land acquisition — survey, CBA notifications, objections, awards, dashboards, and document vault.

t.t-value: 'CBA Act features, coal bearing land acquisition, Section 4, Section 7, Section 11, award compensation, BhuKhadan'

section.p: BHUKHADAN digitises survey, notifications, objections, awards, and payment workflows with audit trails and report-ready documentation.

article.p: Configure projects, villages, and parcel records with field-level tracking and verified ownership details.

ul.li: Khasra, owner, and geo details in one flow

article.p: Generate and monitor coal-bearing area notifications with date-based status, workflow approvals, and digital traceability.
Handle intention to acquire, objection intake, hearing actions, and resolution outcomes from one structured dashboard.
Drive declaration, acquisition order, beneficiary validation, and compensation calculations with ready reports.

ul.li: Land, tree, and asset compensation support

article.p: Enable Patwari, RI, Tehsildar, SDM, and Collector level actions with strict permission and approval routing.
Track project progress, timeline bottlenecks, and pending actions through district and department dashboards.
Store, manage, and retrieve official files, templates, and signed outputs with searchable metadata.
Manage districts, tehsils, villages, rates, tree masters, sections, and reusable reference masters centrally.

div.p: Sample output views used for review and department communication.
Overview snapshot for project progress and section-wise status.
Representative format for award and compensation sheets.
Template-style preview for downloadable notification documents.

t.t: Contact BhuKhadan for coal-bearing land acquisition platform demos, CBA project enquiries, and partnership requests. We respond within 24 hours.

t.t-value: 'contact BhuKhadan, CBA Act demo, coal bearing land acquisition enquiry, BhuKhadan support'

section.span: We'd love to hear from you
section.p: Questions, demo requests, or partnership enquiries — our team is here to help.

div.p: Choose the channel that works best for you. We typically respond within 24 hours.
Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
A unified digital platform for coal-bearing land acquisition under the CBA(A&D) Act, 1957 — with transparency and full accountability from notification to award.

div.span: Developed by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED

t.t: BhuKhadan cookie policy — how we use essential and optional cookies on bhuarjan.com for security, preferences, and analytics.

t.t-value: 'BhuKhadan cookie policy, website cookies, privacy, land acquisition platform'

div.p: How BhuKhadan uses cookies to keep the platform secure and improve your experience.

We use cookies and similar technologies to provide core website functionality, remember your preferences, and understand how visitors use bhuarjan.com. You can accept all cookies, allow only essentials, or change your choice at any time using the cookie banner or the cookie settings control.
div.h2: Overview of cookies we may use

tr.td: Required for security, session management, and basic site operation.
Session ID, CSRF protection, login state, cookie consent choice
Remember preferences such as language and interface choices.
Help us measure traffic and improve content (only if you opt in).
Anonymous visit statistics, page performance metrics
Used only if optional marketing cookies are enabled on the website.

div.p: When you first visit our website, you can choose Only essentials or I agree for optional cookies. You can reopen cookie settings from the small cookie control shown at the bottom of the page after your first choice.
You can also clear cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may prevent parts of the website or login portal from working correctly.
Questions about this policy? Email support@bhuarjan.com or visit our contact page.
Platform developed and maintained by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
